# kCMBlockBufferPermitEmptyReferenceFlag

**Global Variable**

Passed to [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMBlockBuffer] and [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMBlockBuffer] to allow references into a `CMBlockBuffer` that may not yet be populated.

## Declaration

```swift
var kCMBlockBufferPermitEmptyReferenceFlag: CMBlockBufferFlags { get }
```

## Constants

- **kCMBlockBufferAssureMemoryNowFlag**: When passed to routines that accept block allocators, causes the memory block to be allocated immediately.
- **kCMBlockBufferAlwaysCopyDataFlag**: Used with [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMBlockBuffer] to cause it to always produce an allocated copy of the desired data.
- **kCMBlockBufferDontOptimizeDepthFlag**: Passed to block buffers to suppress reference depth optimization.
